candidates.why: Candidate list entry for direct costs, but it is blank and does not appear to capture this shipping/service company's main operating direct costs.

variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list appears to miss the company's actual direct cost structure. Multiple rows could represent service delivery/direct costs (e.g., Voyage Related Expenses, Vessel Expenses, TC Related Expenses, Bareboat Related Expenses, Terminal Costs, possibly Procurement Expenses). Chose Voyage Related Expenses as the minimal best outside-candidate label, but manual review is needed to determine the full COGS mapping. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Voyage Related Expenses
